query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: An abstract black-and-white image showing layered rock formations or geological strata, with horizontal bands of varying tones stretching across the frame. The composition emphasizes textural variations between lighter and darker mineral layers.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract black-and-white image showing layered rock formations or geological strata, rendered with extreme motion blur that smears horizontal bands into streaks of flowing gray tones. Fine mineral textures and structural details dissolve into mushy, indistinct gradients. The low-contrast palette crushes midtones together, creating a heavy, suffocating atmosphere where light and dark areas barely separate, leaving the geological subject barely legible beneath the intentional soft-focus treatment.
